s: In 2022, MacKenzie Gore suited up for SDP as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.500, WHIP 1.470, SO 72, WAR 0.800.
Changed teams after the previous season (SDP -> WSN).
In 2023, MacKenzie Gore suited up for WSN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.420, WHIP 1.400, SO 151, WAR 1.200. Notable context: Joined WSN.
In 2024, MacKenzie Gore suited up for WSN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.900, WHIP 1.420, SO 181, WAR 3.200.
In 2025, MacKenzie Gore suited up for WSN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.170, WHIP 1.350, SO 185, WAR 2.900.
Changed teams after the previous season (WSN -> TEX).
In 2026, MacKenzie Gore suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.970, WHIP 0.970, SO 16, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined TEX.
